# Alchemy Branding Studio

> Brand strategy, design and animation for ambitious SMEs. We make your brand clear, credible and hard to overlook, so the right clients choose you.

Alchemy Branding Studio is a Cardiff-based brand consultancy and creative studio. We work with growing businesses that have a small in-house marketing team, or none at all, and a brand that has started to lag behind the company. Most engagements begin with a Brand Strategy Workshop that diagnoses what is actually holding the brand back; identity, website, animation, content and sales collateral then follow from that roadmap. Alchemy is part of a three-brand group alongside the Brand to Scale podcast and Jessica Morgan Consulting.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://alchemybranding.studio/): What Alchemy does and who it is for.
- [Services](https://alchemybranding.studio/services): The workshop-led approach to brand strategy, design and animation.
- [Work and portfolio](https://alchemybranding.studio/portfolio): Case studies across branding and animation.
- [About](https://alchemybranding.studio/about): The studio, the team and how we work.
- [Free brand audit for SMEs](https://alchemybranding.studio/free-brand-audit-for-smes): A no-cost review of your brand and marketing, with prioritised next steps.
- [Custom proposal and pitch deck design](https://alchemybranding.studio/custom-proposal-design): On-brand proposal templates built to help buyers say yes.
- [Animation](https://alchemybranding.studio/animation): Animated explainers and brand films.
- [Branding services in Cardiff](https://alchemybranding.studio/branding-services-cardiff): Brand strategy and design for Cardiff and South Wales businesses.
- [Contact](https://alchemybranding.studio/contact): Start a conversation or send a brief.

- [Brand to Scale podcast](https://www.brandtoscale.co.uk): The group's podcast for scaling businesses.
- [Jessica Morgan Consulting](https://www.jessicamorganconsulting.co.uk): The group's consultancy arm.
